name: Krafton AI
description: Kraftons deep-learning division exposing reinforcement-learning and character AI SDKs for game developers.

seo.title: Krafton AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Krafton AI: Kraftons deep-learning division exposing reinforcement-learning and character AI SDKs for game developers.

when_to_use: Integrating reinforcement learning AI into game agent behaviors
Building adaptive NPC AI with Krafton's character AI SDK
Training game AI agents with RL in simulation environments
Accessing deep learning tools tailored for game development use cases

pros: Deep RL and character AI expertise from game devs
SDKs tuned for real-time game loops
Backed by a major studio with content pipeline
cons: Tight focus on gaming limits external adoption
SDK and docs mostly aimed at Krafton partners
review.verdict: Compelling for studios partnering with Krafton; not a general AI dev platform.
review.best_for: Game studios exploring RL or advanced character AI via Krafton tie-ins
review.not_for: Non-gaming AI developers or self-serve SaaS use cases
